mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CO_INFORMATION c USING (
SELECT #{stockCode} AS STOCK_CODE, #{corpCode} AS CORP_CODE, #{corpName} AS CO_NAME FROM DUAL
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCKS s WHERE s.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode} )
) s
ON ( c.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.CORP_CODE = s.CORP_CODE, c.CO_NAME = s.CO_NAME WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CORP_CODE, STOCK_CODE, CO_NAME ) VALUES ( s.CORP_CODE, s.STOCK_CODE, s.CO_NAME )
mapper.select: SELECT CORP_CODE, STOCK_CODE FROM CO_INFORMATION WHERE CORP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND STOCK_CODE IS NOT NULL

SELECT s.STOCK_CODE AS stockCode, s.STOCK_NAME AS stockName, s.MARKET_TYPE AS marketType, s.SECTOR AS sector, TO_CHAR(s.LISTED_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS listedDate, s.STATUS AS status, c.CORP_CODE AS corpCode, c.CO_NAME AS coName, c.ISSUED_STOCK AS issuedStock, c.DECLINED_STOCK AS declinedStock, c.TREASURY_STOCK AS treasuryStock, c.OUTSTANDING_SHARES AS outstandingShares, c.MINORITY_SHAREHOLDER_RATIO AS shareholdingRatio, c.MINORITY_OWNERSHIP_RATIO AS ownershipPercentage FROM STOCKS s LEFT JOIN CO_INFORMATION c ON c.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE WHERE s.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}
SELECT STOCK_CODE FROM STOCKS WHERE STOCK_CODE IS NOT NULL ORDER BY STOCK_CODE

SELECT HISTORY_ID AS historyId, STOCK_CODE AS stockCode, PERIOD_TYPE AS periodType, BASE_DATE AS baseDate, OPEN_PRICE AS openPrice, HIGH_PRICE AS highPrice, LOW_PRICE AS lowPrice, CLOSE_PRICE AS closePrice, VOLUME AS volume, CHANGE_PRICE AS changePrice, CHANGE_RATE AS changeRate FROM STOCK_HISTORY_CACHE WHERE STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode} AND PERIOD_TYPE = #{periodType} AND BASE_DATE BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY BASE_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE stock_realtime_current SET current_price = #{currentPrice}, change_rate = #{changeRate}, volume = #{volume}, updated_at = #{tradeTime} WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_realtime_current ( stock_code, current_price, change_rate, volume, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{currentPrice}, #{changeRate}, #{volume}, #{tradeTime} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM stock_realtime_tick WHERE trade_time < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO FETCH_STATE t USING ( SELECT 'HISTORY' AS FETCH_TYPE, #{stockCode} AS LAST_STOCK_CODE, #{periodType} AS LAST_PERIOD_TYPE FROM dual ) s ON ( t.FETCH_TYPE = s.FETCH_TYPE )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LAST_STOCK_CODE = s.LAST_STOCK_CODE, LAST_PERIOD_TYPE = s.LAST_PERIOD_TYPE, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( FETCH_TYPE, LAST_STOCK_CODE, LAST_PERIOD_TYPE, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( s.FETCH_TYPE, s.LAST_STOCK_CODE, s.LAST_PERIOD_TYPE, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT LAST_STOCK_CODE, LAST_PERIOD_TYPE FROM FETCH_STATE WHERE FETCH_TYPE = 'HISTORY'
